## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Failing test written and committed first
- [ ] Implementation passes all tests
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] No architecture doc modifications
- [ ] PR linked with `closes #N`

## Definition of Done
- [ ] All acceptance criteria met
- [ ] PR reviewed and merged
- [ ] Downstream issues unblocked (remove `blocked` label)
